issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect. Card text says 'add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand' — this is drawing/retrieving a Life card, not flipping life total. Should be DrawCard with source:Life or equivalent mechanic; FlipLife changes life total, not hand.

PlayFromHand is incorrect. Card text says 'Add up to 1 of your Characters with a cost of 3 to the top of the owner's Life cards face-up' — this means moving a Character already on board to Life cards (the reverse of normal play), not playing from hand. Should be a custom action like 'MoveToLife' or 'AttachToLife', not PlayFromHand.
Filter should be exactly cost 3 (costEqual:3 or cost:3), not 'up to 3' (maxCost). Text specifies 'a cost of 3'.
Missing condition: 'You may' indicates this is optional, but no condition reflects optionality in the DSL structure.
